experience.description: Coordinated outreach programs in rural villages focusing on disease prevention and health promotion. Organized education sessions on social determinants of health and worked to improve health equity in underserved communities.

sop: Growing up I saw how unequal health access is in rural India, and that's what pulled me toward sociology. After graduating, working as a community outreach coordinator at an NGO showed me that real change happens on the ground — through community health programs, outreach, and education, not just top-down policy. I want to learn how to design programs that actually address social determinants and improve health equity for underserved populations. Long term, I'd love to lead health equity programs at a state health department.
